title: [Comb] Path-sensitive mux condition canonicalizer
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is an MLIR optimizer bug in CIRCT's comb mux canonicalizer. The issue shows FIRRTL input and generated MLIR, not SystemVerilog constructs. The bug manifests during optimization passes (mux chain collapsing, dead code elimination) rather than being triggered by specific SV language features.
